ddls:
CREATE TABLE "solar_panels" (
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solar panel installation */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the solar panel was installed */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the solar panel installation */,
  "capacity_kw" REAL /* Capacity of the solar panel in kilowatts */,
  "panel_type" TEXT /* Type of the solar panel */,
  "orientation" REAL /* Orientation of the solar panel (in degrees) */,
  "tilt_angle" REAL /* Tilt angle of the solar panel (in degrees) */,
  "tracking_system" INTEGER /* Whether the solar panel has a tracking system */,
  "installation_company" TEXT /* Company that installed the solar panel */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the solar panel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "panel_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar panel the data belongs to */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data collection */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the solar panel */,
  "pv1_voltage" REAL /* Voltage of PV1 */,
  "pv2_voltage" REAL /* Voltage of PV2 */,
  "pv1_current" REAL /* Current of PV1 */,
  "pv2_current" REAL /* Current of PV2 */,
  "total_energy" REAL /* Total energy produced by the solar panel */,
  "irradiance" REAL /* Irradiance of the solar panel */,
  "module_temperature" REAL /* Module temperature of the solar panel */,
  "inverter_temperature" REAL /* Inverter temperature of the solar panel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_data_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES solar_panels ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "grid_data" (
  "grid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each grid data point */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar panel the grid data belongs to */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the grid data collection */,
  "current_to_grid_r" REAL /* Current to grid (R Phase) */,
  "grid_voltage_r" REAL /* Grid voltage (R Phase) */,
  "grid_frequency_r" REAL /* Grid frequency (R Phase) */,
  "current_to_grid_s" REAL /* Current to grid (S Phase) */,
  "grid_voltage_s" REAL /* Grid voltage (S Phase) */,
  "grid_frequency_s" REAL /* Grid frequency (S Phase) */,
  "current_to_grid_t" REAL /* Current to grid (T Phase) */,
  "grid_voltage_t" REAL /* Grid voltage (T Phase) */,
  "grid_frequency_t" REAL /* Grid frequency (T Phase) */,
  "grid_status" TEXT /* Status of the grid connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("grid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_grid_data_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES solar_panels ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_impact" (
  "impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental impact data point */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar panel the environmental impact data belongs to */,
  "time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the environmental impact data collection */,
  "reduced_co2" REAL /* Reduced amount of CO2 */,
  "reduced_so2" REAL /* Reduced amount of SO2 */,
  "reduced_oil" REAL /* Reduced amount of oil */,
  "reduced_coal" REAL /* Reduced amount of coal */,
  "reduced_water" REAL /* Reduced amount of water */,
  "reduced_landfill" REAL /* Reduced amount of landfill */,
  "carbon_credit" REAL /* Carbon credit earned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_impact_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES solar_panels ("panel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, maintenance, researcher) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "panel_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "panel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solar panel */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., cleaning, inspection, repair) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_panel_maintenance_panel_id FOREIGN KEY ("panel_id") REFERENCES solar_panels ("panel_id")
)
